notes: Flat-shading uniformly enforced on all 6 non-crystal GLBs via applyFlatShading(). Crystal ball correctly exempted (smooth glass aesthetic). No flat-shading leaks detected.
sol_pierre Y=-4.98 (+0.02u above procedural floor Y=-5) is intentional anti-z-fighting offset; polygonOffset factor=-2/units=-4 on mur_pierre covers shallow camera angles.

Crystal PointLight range=5 vs candle sharedLight range=9 is asymmetric — crystal influence sphere clips at ~1.5u from ball surface while candle covers 9u. Visually apparent in dark corner near bookshelf.
5-source lighting (key/rim/fill/backAccent/cauldron) with low-end mobile adaptive path (drop backAccent when lowEnd=true) is well-structured.
Crystal pulse: intensity 2.2+sin(t*1.8)*0.4, emissiveIntensity 0.5+sin(t*1.4)*0.15 — dual-frequency non-phase-locked gives organic breathing. PASS.
Door burst flicker: intensity 12+sin(t*45)*4 during doorFlashing — fast strobe frequency 45rad/s appropriate for dramatic reveal.
Deduction: -1.0 for crystalLight.range=5 asymmetry (known LOW from C43, still unfixed).
6 GLB assets in production: cauldron_merlin, bougie (x3), table_druidique, bibliotheque, sol_pierre, mur_pierre, crystal_ball. Full Celtic lair vocabulary covered.
Procedural fallback on every loadGLB().catch() — resilient on slow/offline connections.
Fade-in on GLB load (fadeInGLB 400ms) prevents hard pop-in. Correct transparent→opaque lifecycle restoring transparent=false to avoid depth-sort artifacts.
Bougie clone pattern correctly clones materials per instance (BUG-L-10 fix) — no shared-ref flicker pollution.
GLB abort guard (isDisposed callback) on all 6 load calls — no late scene.add() after dispose.
C101 onCrystalGLBLoaded callback syncs GLB float Y with procedural sphere during update() — GLB and hitTarget stay aligned.
Deduction: -0.5 for candle sharedLight Y centroid (~-2.45) being ~2.4u above CANDLE_POSITIONS[*][1]=-4.85 (flame base). Light centroid hangs too high. Known LOW from C43, unfixed.
FPS monitor samples every 2s, sets lowFpsMode below 45fps. Dust motes skipped in lowFpsMode (saves ~1ms/frame). Well-targeted optimization for cosmetic-only system.
Wall tiles use InstancedMesh: 48 draw calls reduced to 3 (back 18 + left 15 + right 15). Significant GPU overhead reduction on mobile.
AudioContext singleton (_sharedAudioCtx) with closed-state guard prevents Chrome 6-context / Safari 1-context cap exhaustion across rapid minigame completions.
tieredValue helper eliminates 4-element array index boilerplate in all 14 minigames — DRY, no runtime overhead.
lairDisposed guard at top of update() prevents stale rAF calls after dispose on slow devices.
dispose() removes all 6 event listeners, traverses scene disposing geometry+materials, removes renderer DOM element, removes ariaLive and zoneToast. Memory leak potential: LOW.
stopAmbient() called in dispose() — audio resource released on teardown. PASS.

Deduction: -1.0 for non-owning geometry references in InstancedMesh: tileGeo and tileMat are cloned but not explicitly disposed in the scene traversal (traverse only hits Mesh/Points, not InstancedMesh with externally managed geo/mat). Potential VRAM leak on repeated lair mount/unmount cycles.
ariaLive div with role=status + aria-live=polite — zone name announced on keyboard navigation. PASS.
Canvas has tabIndex=0 + outline:2px solid #cd853f:2px on focus — keyboard reachability confirmed.
Zone toast uses createElement+textContent throughout (both mouse and keyboard paths, lines 848-856 and 969-977) — XSS-safe. C104 annotation present. PASS.
Toast shows zone label (ZONE_ARIA_LABELS) + lore description (ZONE_LORE) — two-tier information hierarchy appropriate.
Touch events: touchmove (passive:false for preventDefault), touchstart (passive:false), touchend registered. Mobile touch fully wired.
showOutcomeOverlay uses role=status + aria-live=assertive for minigame result feedback. PASS.
Outcome overlay uses clamp() for responsive font sizing (clamp(22px,5vw,32px) / clamp(14px,3vw,18px)) — mobile-safe.

Deduction: -1.0 for canvas missing aria-label attribute. The 3D canvas itself has no accessible name — screen readers cannot identify the canvas as 'Antre de Merlin' or similar. ariaLive announces zone changes but the canvas widget has no static label.

Hover emissive boost on all 5 zone targets (map, crystal, bookshelf, door, cauldron) — confirmed via InteractiveObject.visualMesh pattern and onCauldronGLBLoaded/onCrystalGLBLoaded callbacks ensuring GLB path also gets hover.
Cursor changes to pointer on zone hover, resets to default on leave. PASS.
Camera slow sway: sin(t*0.3*2pi)*0.1 on X, 0.5+sin(t*0.23*2pi)*0.06 on Y — gentle life-giving oscillation without inducing motion sickness (amplitude 0.1u/0.06u).
Crystal float: Y=-1.0+sin(t*0.9)*0.04 — subtle. GLB group synced via crystalGLBGroup.position.y. PASS.
Door burst flicker during cinematic (doorFlashTimer, intensity 12+sin(t*45)*4) — high-impact feedback for navigation.
checkCriticalAlert fires critical_alert SFX once at timeLeft<=3s, edge-triggered with criticalAlerted reset per play(). No double-fire. PASS.
getDeltaTime() capped at 100ms suppresses tab-switch spikes. First-frame safe default 1/60. PASS.
Deduction: -1.0 for absence of haptic feedback (navigator.vibrate) on mobile touch zone activation — standard in AAA mobile experiences.
5 zone labels match GDB: map=biome selection, crystal=oghams, bookshelf=journal/lore, door=run entry, cauldron=Merlin dialogue. Celtic lair vocabulary coherent.
ZONE_LORE descriptions provide narrative depth on hover — Celtic immersion reinforced at every interaction point.
MinigameBase 4-tier outcome system (desastre/echec/reussite/maitrise with 0-25/26-50/51-85/86-100 thresholds) maps correctly to game design v2.4 proportional effects.
tieredValue applied across all 14 minigames (47 total usages confirmed) — difficulty scaling operational for C94 cross-run tier progression.
mg_negociation faction keywords (druides/anciens/korrigans/niamh/ankou) match the 5 official factions from merlin_constants.gd. Lore consistency PASS.
OUTCOME_CONFIG flavor texts are Celtic-flavored and faction-neutral — appropriate for a cross-faction minigame result.

Deduction: -1.0 for mg_regard having only 1 tieredValue usage (showTime scaling only). Difficulty scaling appears incomplete — no tieredValue for word count, distraction frequency, or target pool size. Potential balance outlier at Tier 2-3.

top_bugs.title: InstancedMesh geometry/material not disposed in scene teardown
top_bugs.description: The scene.traverse() in MerlinLairScene.ts dispose() only handles THREE.Mesh and THREE.Points. The 3 InstancedMeshes created for mur_pierre (backMesh, leftMesh, rightMesh) use tileGeo and tileMat which are .clone()d but never explicitly disposed. On repeated Lair mount/unmount (hub navigation), these accumulate as VRAM orphans. The geometry and material are not reachable by the traverse because InstancedMesh is a separate class branch not matched by `obj instanceof THREE.Mesh`.
top_bugs.recommendation: Add `obj instanceof THREE.InstancedMesh` branch to the dispose() traversal, OR store the 3 InstancedMesh refs and call .geometry.dispose() + .material.dispose() explicitly in LairGLBAssets cleanup callback.

top_bugs.title: crystalLight.range=5 asymmetric vs candle sharedLight.range=9
top_bugs.description: Crystal PointLight constructed with range=5 (line 172: PointLight(0x9060cc, 2.5, 5, 2)). Candle sharedLight has range=9 (line 337). At the crystal position near the bookshelf wall, range=5 causes the purple glow to clip visibly against the back wall and floor at ~1.5u from the ball center. The bookshelf GLB (positioned at X=8.8) receives almost no crystal light spillover. Known since C43, not yet fixed.
top_bugs.recommendation: Increase crystalLight.range to 8 or 9 to match candle light radius and ensure the purple glow softly reaches the bookshelf and back-wall stone, reinforcing the magical atmosphere. Adjust base intensity from 2.5 to 2.0 to compensate for wider radius.

top_bugs.title: Candle sharedLight Y centroid ~2.4u above actual flame positions
top_bugs.description: sharedLight position Y = (-1.6 + -4.6 + -3.0)/3 + 0.55 = -3.0 + 0.55 = -2.45. But CANDLE_POSITIONS[*][1] = -4.85 (in LairGLBAssets.ts). This places the candle light source ~2.4 units above the GLB candle flame tops, creating lighting that appears to come from the ceiling rather than the candle wicks. The +0.55 offset was designed for the procedural wicks but overshoots badly relative to the GLB candle scale (0.42). Known since C43, unfixed.
top_bugs.recommendation: Recompute sharedLight Y centroid using CANDLE_POSITIONS[*][1] directly: (-4.85 + -4.85 + -4.85)/3 + 0.3 = -4.55. The +0.3 offset accounts for wick height at bougie.glb scale 0.42. Update line 338 accordingly.

carry_forward_issues.description: Candle sharedLight Y centroid ~1.7u above flame — see BUG-C44-03 (re-measured as 2.4u with GLB scale factored)
